input.query: I was charged twice for my subscription last month.

expected.response: I can see the duplicate charge on your account. I have initiated a refund for the extra payment, which should appear within 3-5 business days. Your subscription remains active and correctly billed going forward.

input.query: My API calls are returning 503 errors since this morning.

expected.response: A 503 error indicates the service is temporarily unavailable. Please check our status page for any ongoing incidents. If the issue persists, try increasing your request timeout and implementing exponential backoff. Contact us with your request IDs if the problem continues beyond 30 minutes.
